description: Historical cylinder-count distribution of passenger-car registrations by decade. Use when user asks about 3-cyl downsizing, V8/V6 share over time, or 0-cyl EV arrival. Historical view, not current snapshot.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1950 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2026 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal IS NOT NULL AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal >= 0 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal <= 16 | EVAL decade = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 1960, "1950s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1970, "1960s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1980, "1970s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 1990, "1980s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2000, "1990s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2000s", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2010s", "2020s") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY decade, cylinders = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorCylinderAntal | SORT decade ASC, cylinders ASC | LIMIT 120
